build_system: npm with ts-node for CDK synthesis, tsc for compilation
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform and aws-cdk-lib/assertions (Template.fromStack pattern). Snapshot tests via jest-autoclean.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm install` to install dependencies. 2. Run `npm test` to run Jest tests. 3. Run `npx cdk synth` to synthesize CloudFormation template.
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - auto-generated by jest snapshot tests. Run `npm test -- -u` to update snapshots.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - npm registry accessible. Node.js v22 available. No Docker daemon needed (no Dockerfile in project). No AWS credentials needed (CDK synth only).
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal code. Conventional commits. L2/L3 constructs preferred. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated with Mermaid diagram. All tests + cdk synth must pass before pushing.
key_patterns: Stack defined in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts using Template.fromStack(). Tests use beforeAll to synth once, then individual test() blocks assert resources. Snapshot test at end. EventBridge rule pattern uses source/detailType/detail. Package uses aws-cdk-lib ^2.252.0 with constructs ^10.5.0.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point. lib/ - CDK stack definitions. test/ - Jest tests with __snapshots__/. .github/ - CI workflow and agent guidelines.
